## FacetsService.clearFilters() method

Deselects the selected filters.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
clearFilters(facetIds?: Array<Facet['id']>): void;
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  facetIds | Array&lt;Facet\['id'\]&gt; | An optional list of facets ids from whom deselect the filters. |
